offset_after_named_step: What step title is {relative_offset_phrase} the step titled {source_step_title}?
Find {source_step_title}. What title is printed {relative_offset_phrase} it?
Starting at {source_step_title}, move {relative_offset_phrase}. What step title do you reach?
Which title appears {relative_offset_phrase} the step titled {source_step_title}?
Read the title of the step {relative_offset_phrase} {source_step_title}.
offset_before_named_step: What step title is {relative_offset_phrase} the step titled {source_step_title}?
Find {source_step_title}. What title is printed {relative_offset_phrase} it?
Starting at {source_step_title}, move {relative_offset_phrase}. What step title do you reach?
Which title appears {relative_offset_phrase} the step titled {source_step_title}?
Read the title of the step {relative_offset_phrase} {source_step_title}.
between_named_steps_count: How many numbered steps are strictly between {first_step_title} and {second_step_title}?
Count the steps between the step titled {first_step_title} and the step titled {second_step_title}.
What is the number of steps separating {first_step_title} from {second_step_title}, excluding those two steps?
Between {first_step_title} and {second_step_title}, how many other steps are listed?
Find {first_step_title} and {second_step_title}. How many step cards lie between them?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:step_list.object_description: a numbered workflow step list where each step card has labeled Title and Detail fields plus other small fields

query:offset_after_named_step.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible title of the step reached by the requested offset
query:offset_after_named_step.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the answer step title

query:offset_before_named_step.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible title of the step reached by the requested offset
query:offset_before_named_step.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the answer step title

query:between_named_steps_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:between_named_steps_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "first_named_title" and "second_named_title", each containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the corresponding named step title
